A.missing: no before/after transition from far to near/inside; just static MOVE + NEAR
A.reason: Skeleton: motion plus near-location, but no rendering of approaching/entering as a change of state.

B.missing: entering (INSIDE) not rendered, only approaching from far
B.reason: Renders approaching: was far, moved, then no longer far — captures the act of approaching though entering is soft.

C.reason: Before: not inside; after: inside — cleanly renders entering, plus motion; approaching/entering both covered.

D.missing: no before/after change; no far-to-near/inside transition, just HAPPEN + MOVE-to-something
D.reason: Generic event plus motion into something; lacks the approach/enter transition structure.

E.missing: entering only as CAN, not achieved; slight bloat
E.reason: Was far, moved, then near, and can be inside — renders approaching-and-entering, minor looseness on entry.

F.missing: entering only as MAYBE; slight bloat
F.reason: Was not inside, moved, then near, maybe inside — captures approach/entry with soft entering.

G.missing: no from-far transition; static MOVE + NEAR only
G.reason: Skeleton: motion plus near, no rendering of change of state defining approaching/entering.
